mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chat_room (id, name, is_public, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{isPublic}, NOW(), NOW());
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.name, m.is_public , CASE WHEN tcrp.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_joined FROM tb_chat_room m LEFT JOIN tb_chat_room_participant tcrp ON m.id = tcrp.room_id AND tcrp.user_id = #{userId}
